acceptance_criteria.text: CRM sync cannot write data until the user has run preview and sends the matching fresh preview token.
proof: Sync requires confirm_preview_token and validates provider, period, token, and TTL.

acceptance_criteria.text: If CRM data changes after preview, sync refuses to import and asks for a new preview.
proof: Sync recomputes the token from fresh CRM data before importing.

acceptance_criteria.text: CRM appointments with resource/workplace fields produce workplace finance rows with booked minutes and revenue.
gaps: Separate provider schedule endpoint is not implemented yet.

acceptance_criteria.text: Existing finance CRM, import, and KPI tests keep passing.
Finance CRM panel makes the safe flow clear: preview first, then confirmed import.
proof: Import button disabled until preview_token exists.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: cd frontend && npm exec -- eslint src/components/FinanceCrmPanel.tsx
known_gaps: Live YCLIENTS/Altegio sync still needs real credentials and provider agreement.
Separate provider schedule availability endpoint remains a later step.
